name: Women's Puffer Jacket
description: Lightweight quilted puffer jacket with recycled fill, DWR coating, and packable design for easy travel.

specifications.value: 2 Side Zip Pockets, 1 Stuff Sack Pocket
Machine Wash Cold, Tumble Dry Low

reviews.title: Warm, light, and stylish
reviews.reviewText: Incredibly lightweight but genuinely warm. The DWR coating handled light rain fine and it packs down into its own pocket beautifully. Perfect as a layering piece or for mild winter days.

reviews.title: My go-to jacket this autumn
reviews.reviewText: Flattering cut and great warmth-to-weight ratio. I appreciated that it uses recycled fill. The packable feature is very useful for travel. I have used it daily since buying.

reviews.title: Good quality puffer jacket
reviews.reviewText: The jacket is attractive and warm. Fit runs slightly slim so consider sizing up if you layer underneath. The packable design is genuinely useful. Happy with the purchase overall.
